Log:
  net/quiterss: Update to 0.19.2

      * Fixed: Problems with msvcp140.dll and vcruntime140.dll (Windows)
      * Fixed: Images are not displayed in some feeds
      * Fixed: Sometimes news filter did not work when updating feeds
